records.m_Talk_ENG: GAP-13 will soon reach its target altitude!
records.m_Talk_DEU: GAP-13 will soon reach its target altitude!
records.m_Talk_FRA: GAP-13 will soon reach its target altitude!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is Headquarters! Commander Alice, do you copy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is Headquarters! Commander Alice, do you copy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is Headquarters! Commander Alice, do you copy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How are things looking on your side?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How are things looking on your side?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How are things looking on your side?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Besides the stuffy spacesuit, I'm all good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Besides the stuffy spacesuit, I'm all good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Besides the stuffy spacesuit, I'm all good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We haven't figured out the cause yet, but all the other strategic satellites except the data-corrupted one are offline.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We haven't figured out the cause yet, but all the other strategic satellites except the data-corrupted one are offline.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We haven't figured out the cause yet, but all the other strategic satellites except the data-corrupted one are offline.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can you see the current state of outer space with your own eyes right now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can you see the current state of outer space with your own eyes right now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can you see the current state of outer space with your own eyes right now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander Alice? Do you hear me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander Alice? Do you hear me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander Alice? Do you hear me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It looks like a bird...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It looks like a bird...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It looks like a bird...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A bird? What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A bird? What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A bird? What are you talking about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can you describe what you are seeing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can you describe what you are seeing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can you describe what you are seeing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What we thought was the enemy wasn't a data-corrupted strategic satellite.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What we thought was the enemy wasn't a data-corrupted strategic satellite.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What we thought was the enemy wasn't a data-corrupted strategic satellite.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what it is, but... it looks like a glowing blue-white ship drifting in space.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what it is, but... it looks like a glowing blue-white ship drifting in space.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what it is, but... it looks like a glowing blue-white ship drifting in space.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A pale bluish light ship...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A pale bluish light ship...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A pale bluish light ship...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm transmitting it through the external camera to the Headquarters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm transmitting it through the external camera to the Headquarters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm transmitting it through the external camera to the Headquarters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think that is the culprit of this situation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think that is the culprit of this situation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think that is the culprit of this situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My instinct tells me that if I don't eliminate it, nothing will change.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My instinct tells me that if I don't eliminate it, nothing will change.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My instinct tells me that if I don't eliminate it, nothing will change.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Firstly, return to base, Commander Alice!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Firstly, return to base, Commander Alice!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Firstly, return to base, Commander Alice!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We don't know what it is. It's dangerous for you to attempt shooting it down on your own!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We don't know what it is. It's dangerous for you to attempt shooting it down on your own!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We don't know what it is. It's dangerous for you to attempt shooting it down on your own!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...No. We don't have enough time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...No. We don't have enough time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...No. We don't have enough time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The more I hesitate, the more danger my comrades will be in Philharmonic Hall.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The more I hesitate, the more danger my comrades will be in Philharmonic Hall.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The more I hesitate, the more danger my comrades will be in Philharmonic Hall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Alice...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Alice...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Alice...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Detecting heat signals from the unidentified hostile!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Detecting heat signals from the unidentified hostile!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Detecting heat signals from the unidentified hostile!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's... the Administration strategic satellite's active defense system...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's... the Administration strategic satellite's active defense system...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's... the Administration strategic satellite's active defense system...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems that the ship has docked to the satellite and using the Administration's technology as its own!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems that the ship has docked to the satellite and using the Administration's technology as its own!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems that the ship has docked to the satellite and using the Administration's technology as its own!

records.m_Talk_ENG: GAP-13 has no firepower to deal with the enemy!
records.m_Talk_DEU: GAP-13 has no firepower to deal with the enemy!
records.m_Talk_FRA: GAP-13 has no firepower to deal with the enemy!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You must make a decision, Commander!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You must make a decision, Commander!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You must make a decision, Commander!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know that!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know that!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know that!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maze Commander! I'm going to infiltrate the ship with my ability!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maze Commander! I'm going to infiltrate the ship with my ability!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maze Commander! I'm going to infiltrate the ship with my ability!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll radio in again after cutting its power!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll radio in again after cutting its power!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll radio in again after cutting its power!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Alice...!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Alice...!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Alice...!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: GAP-13 has been shot down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: GAP-13 has been shot down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: GAP-13 has been shot down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I can't stand myself for acting so pathetically.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I can't stand myself for acting so pathetically.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I can't stand myself for acting so pathetically.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are our options? Is just watching and waiting all we can do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are our options? Is just watching and waiting all we can do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are our options? Is just watching and waiting all we can do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Alice Braidwood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Alice Braidwood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Alice Braidwood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I promise to save your division members trapped in Philharmonic Hall.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I promise to save your division members trapped in Philharmonic Hall.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I promise to save your division members trapped in Philharmonic Hall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, I pray that you succeed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, I pray that you succeed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, I pray that you succeed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: GAP-13 will soon reach its target altitude!
root.m_Talk_DEU: GAP-13 will soon reach its target altitude!
